subcodes.first_line: O thou discerning photographer! Praise be to God that thou hast recognized thy Lord, laid down thy life, and perfected thine own task [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عکاس حق شناس الحمد لله که خدا را شناختی و جان باختی و کار خویش ساختی و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @compassion; kindness
